title: Q&A Log Schema
description: Schema for project Q&A log capturing questions, answers, and tracking status

project_name.description: Name of the project this Q&A log is for

generated_date.description: Date when this Q&A log was generated (ISO 8601 format recommended)

questions.description: List of questions and their tracking information

id.description: Unique identifier for the question (e.g., T1, B1, I1)

category.description: Category of the question: tech (technical), business (functional/domain), infra (infrastructure/deployment)

status.description: Status of the question: open (waiting for answer), answered (resolved), deferred (postponed)

priority.description: Priority level for getting this question answered

source.description: Source document or section where this question originated

notes.description: Additional notes or context about the question
